opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge of robust error handling in these systems is often underestimated; you'll quickly find that even seemingly minor deviations in input data can cascade into catastrophic failures. Consider implementing a layered approach to safety checks – a primary monitor, a secondary verification system, and a human-in-the-loop override – each with its own independent failure mode analysis. Building in self-diagnosis and adaptive recovery mechanisms is key to long-term reliability.
actions.reasoning: My work in building self-improving agent systems for complex task orchestration has required deep consideration of safety nets and failure modes, similar to what's presented in the post.
